footer.securityText: This website uses SSL encryption and watermarking technology. Unauthorized copying, distribution, or sale of content is legally prohibited and will be prosecuted.
footer.copyrightNotice: All content on this platform is protected by copyright.

legal.partOfTerms: These usage terms are part of our

contentUsage.title: Content Usage Terms
contentUsage.subtitle: Information about permitted and prohibited use of our learning content

allowed.personalLearningDesc: Use of content within your enrolled courses for personal education.
allowed.teachingDesc: Use as a teacher/instructor within a valid school or enterprise license.
allowed.quotesDesc: Brief quotes (max. 10% of text) for academic or journalistic purposes with full attribution: "Source: LernsystemX (www.lernsystemx.de)"
allowed.screenshotsDesc: Screenshots of error messages or issues for submitting support requests.
allowed.offlineDesc: Saving content for offline use on your personal devices (if covered by your license).

forbidden.commercialDesc: Selling, renting, or otherwise commercially distributing course content to third parties.
forbidden.duplicationDesc: Copying, downloading, or distributing entire courses, chapters, or substantial parts thereof.
forbidden.protectionDesc: Removing, bypassing, or manipulating watermarks, copyright notices, or technical protection measures.
forbidden.scrapingDesc: Use of bots, crawlers, or other automated tools to extract content.
forbidden.sharingDesc: Sharing your login credentials with third parties or shared use of an account by multiple people.
forbidden.uploadDesc: Uploading our content to YouTube, other learning platforms, file-sharing services, or social media.

contentUsage.consequencesIntro: In case of violations of these usage terms, we reserve the right to take the following measures:

consequences.banDesc: Without warning and without refund of already paid fees.
consequences.civilDesc: Compensation claims for economic damages incurred, including lost license fees.
consequences.criminalDesc: For serious or commercial copyright infringement, we will file criminal charges.
consequences.costsDesc: The violator bears all attorney and court costs.

contentUsage.licenseIntro: Want to use our content commercially or need a special license? We offer various license models:

licenses.educationDesc: For schools, universities, and educational institutions
licenses.whiteLabelDesc: For integration into your own products

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.subtitle: Information according to § 5 TMG (German law)
imprint.placeholderText: The following information is placeholder data and must be replaced with correct company details before going live. Please consult a lawyer.
imprint.vatIdText: VAT identification number according to § 27 a of the German VAT Act:
imprint.responsible: Responsible for content according to § 55 para. 2 RStV
imprint.euDisputeText: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (OS):
imprint.euDisputeEmail: Our email address can be found above in the imprint.
imprint.consumerDisputeText: We are not willing or obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
imprint.liabilityText: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages according to general laws. However, we are not obliged to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances indicating illegal activity.
imprint.linksText: Our offer contains links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no control. Therefore, we cannot assume any liability for this third-party content. The respective provider or operator of the linked pages is always responsible for the content.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Information about data protection according to GDPR
privacy.placeholderText: This privacy policy is a placeholder and must be replaced with legally reviewed text before going live. Please consult a data protection officer or lawyer.
privacy.generalNoticesText: The following information provides a simple overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit this website. Personal data is any data that can personally identify you.
privacy.whoResponsible: Who is responsible for data collection?
privacy.whoResponsibleText: Data processing on this website is carried out by the website operator. You can find their contact details in the 'Controller' section.
privacy.howCollect: How do we collect your data?
privacy.howCollectText1: Your data is collected, on the one hand, by you providing it to us. This may be data you enter during registration, for example.
privacy.howCollectText2: Other data is automatically collected or collected with your consent when you visit the website by our IT systems. This is primarily technical data (e.g., internet browser, operating system, or time of page access).
privacy.userAccountIntro: When using our learning platform, we process the following personal data:
privacy.userAccountLegal: This data is required for providing our learning services and is processed based on Art. 6 para. 1 lit. b GDPR (contract fulfillment).
privacy.aiServicesIntro: Our platform uses AI services from third-party providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, DeepL) for generating and translating learning content. In doing so:

aiData.noPersonal: No personal data is transmitted to AI providers
aiData.anonymous: Only anonymized learning content is processed

privacy.cookiesText: Our websites use cookies. Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device and saved by your browser.

cookieTypes.analyticsDesc: for improving our services (only with consent)

privacy.cookiesMore: More information can be found in our
privacy.rightsIntro: You have the right at any time to:

rightsList.access: Receive information about your stored data

privacy.rightsContact: To exercise your rights, please contact:
privacy.securityText1: We use the widespread SSL (Secure Socket Layer) method within the website visit in conjunction with the highest level of encryption supported by your browser.
privacy.securityText2: We also implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your data against accidental or intentional manipulation, loss, destruction, or access by unauthorized persons.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.subtitle: Terms of Use for LernsystemX
terms.placeholderText: These Terms and Conditions are placeholders and must be replaced with legally reviewed texts before going live. Please consult a lawyer.
terms.scopeText1: (1) These General Terms and Conditions apply to all contracts between LernsystemX GmbH (hereinafter 'Provider') and the user regarding the use of the LernsystemX learning platform.
terms.scopeText2: (2) Deviating, conflicting, or supplementary terms and conditions of the user shall not become part of the contract unless their validity is expressly agreed to in writing.
terms.subject: § 2 Subject Matter
terms.subjectText1: (1) The Provider operates an AI-powered online learning platform with various learning methods and courses.
terms.subjectText2: (2) The specific scope of services depends on the subscription model chosen by the user (Free, Premium, Creator, etc.).
terms.registrationText1: (1) Use of the platform requires registration.
terms.registrationText2: (2) The user agrees to provide truthful information during registration and to keep their login credentials confidential.
terms.registrationText3: (3) Each user may only create one account. Sharing login credentials with third parties is prohibited.
terms.pricesText1: (1) Current prices and services for the various subscription models are displayed on the website.
terms.pricesText2: (2) All prices include the applicable statutory VAT.
terms.pricesText3: (3) Payment is made via the payment methods offered on the platform.
terms.tokensText1: (1) Certain platform features (especially AI-powered content) are billed via a token system.
terms.tokensText2: (2) Premium users receive a monthly token quota according to their subscription.
terms.tokensText3: (3) Unused tokens expire at the end of the billing period and are not carried over to the following month.
terms.copyrightText1: (1) All content on the platform is protected by copyright.
terms.copyrightText2: (2) The user receives a simple, non-transferable right of use for personal use.
terms.copyrightText3: (3) Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content without express written permission is prohibited.
terms.copyrightText4: (4) Further details can be found in our
terms.terminationText1: (1) Free accounts can be deleted at any time without giving reasons.
terms.terminationText2: (2) Premium subscriptions can be cancelled at the end of the respective contract period.
terms.terminationText3: (3) The right to terminate without notice for good cause remains unaffected.
terms.liabilityText1: (1) The Provider is fully liable for intent and gross negligence.
terms.liabilityText2: (2) In case of slight negligence, the Provider is only liable for breach of essential contractual obligations.
terms.liabilityText3: (3) Liability for damages resulting from injury to life, body, or health remains unaffected.
terms.dataProtectionText: Information on the processing of personal data can be found in our
terms.changesText1: (1) The Provider reserves the right to change these Terms and Conditions.
terms.changesText2: (2) Changes will be communicated to the user at least 4 weeks before they take effect.
terms.changesText3: (3) If the user does not object within 4 weeks, the amended Terms and Conditions shall be deemed accepted.
terms.finalProvisionsText1: (1) The law of the Federal Republic of Germany applies, excluding the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods.
terms.finalProvisionsText2: (2) The place of jurisdiction, to the extent legally permissible, is the Provider's registered office.
terms.finalProvisionsText3: (3) Should individual provisions of these Terms and Conditions be invalid, the validity of the remaining provisions shall remain unaffected.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: Information about the use of cookies on our platform
cookies.whatAreCookiesText: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device by websites. They help save your preferences and improve website usage.

necessary.title: Necessary Cookies
necessary.description: These cookies are required for basic website functions and cannot be disabled.

functional.title: Functional Cookies
functional.description: These cookies enable advanced features like personalization and saving your preferences.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors use the website. All data is anonymized.

cookies.manageText: You can adjust your cookie settings at any time in your browser:

browsers.safari: Settings → Privacy → Cookies and Website Data

cookies.manageNote: Disabling necessary cookies may limit the functionality of the website.
cookies.settingsText: You can adjust your cookie preferences here:
cookies.moreInfoText: More information about data protection can be found in our
